storyInfo: Kichisei gets set up and is about to be forced out of Kajimachi. She visits her neighbors to say goodbye, but then the yakuza who set her up run into trouble...

attributes.content: Rows of pachinko machines are laid out in a room of modest size. The sounds of buttons being pressed and explosion sound effects can be heard from inside.
New customer?
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: All the machines are on. Just put a coin in. Help yourself to drinks and snacks at the counter—
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Are you Kichisei?
attributes.name: Cool-Headed Yakuza

attributes.content: Uh, you're not here for pachinko?
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: We heard about your side hustle, and we'd like to ask for some help.
attributes.name: Cool-Headed Yakuza

attributes.content: *sigh* Side hustle? No idea what you mean. I think you've got the wrong girl...
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Our boss just got a bunch of gems in from Sargon. We want you to take a look... here's the offer.
attributes.name: Cool-Headed Yakuza

attributes.content: The yakuza gestures a number with his hand.
(Gulps) ...For real?
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: For real.
attributes.name: Cool-Headed Yakuza

attributes.content: Welcome, Kichisei-san.
attributes.name: Yakuza Boss

attributes.content: The Yamakawa-kai is new in Mitsukue, and we could use a local to help us expand into the market.
attributes.name: Yakuza Boss

attributes.content: Skip the preamble. Where are the goods?
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: The yakuza boss waves his hand, and a heavy briefcase is placed on the table.
So many...?!
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Natural gems that I obtained from a friend. One would have a hard time finding a better collection in all Higashi.
attributes.name: Yakuza Boss

attributes.content: I obtained these gems at considerable expense, but moving them is a challenge...
attributes.name: Yakuza Boss

attributes.content: To put all these treasures on the market at once would not only depreciate their value, but also draw unwanted attention.
attributes.name: Yakuza Boss

attributes.content: I've heard of your appraisal skills and connections in Mitsukue. I'm confident you will be able to find the right buyers for me.
attributes.name: Yakuza Boss

attributes.content: Wait up, I haven't agreed to take the job yet!
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Kichisei picks up a red gem and examines it under the ceiling light.
It looks good at first glance. However...
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: ...However?
attributes.name: Yakuza Boss

attributes.content: Sargon makes great gems, but it's mostly small workshops with low production rates.
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: You have a lot of different types here, but the cuts are similar across the board.
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Too regular. No change of tools. The people who made this batch were novices.
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Look at the corners here. Looks too new. Best-case scenario, it's a new batch. Worst-case scenario... the materials may not have been natural.
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Impossible... impossible!
attributes.name: Yakuza Boss

attributes.content: I watched them take each piece out of the auction house's storage and picked them one by one!
attributes.name: Yakuza Boss

attributes.content: *sigh* If you don't believe me... look at this one.
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: There's a sapphire identical to this in the Varjavandabad Museum called 'Tear of Splendor', with the same tear-shaped gold piece inlaid on it.
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Did you think a Sargonian national treasure could have ended up in this place through a regular auction house?
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: ...Do I need to say any more?
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: You mean... all these treasures... they're fake?
attributes.name: Yakuza Boss

attributes.content: Yes, any appraiser worth her salt would tell you.
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: ...But all of these have been certified by experts.
attributes.name: Yakuza Boss

attributes.content: What...?
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: They came to me by way of a legislator whose name is known to all Higashinese collectors.
attributes.name: Yakuza Boss

attributes.content: You mean Toudou—
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Do not say the name!
attributes.name: Yakuza Boss

attributes.content: He had these gems examined by appraisal agencies before he gave it to me. These certifications were issued by experts.
attributes.name: Yakuza Boss

attributes.content: The boss lays a heavy pile of documents on the table, printed with the logos of various institutions.
(Mutters) Kuso, not people you want to get on the wrong side of...
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: As you can see, not one expert says my treasures are fake. Except you.
attributes.name: Yakuza Boss

attributes.content: ...Why come to me, if you've already had such an authoritative appraisal?
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Like I said at the beginning, Kichisei-san, I would like you to find me some good buyers.
attributes.name: Yakuza Boss

attributes.content: My men have looked into it. Your grandmother was a beacon of Mitsukue's jewelry world, and you took over her business.
attributes.name: Yakuza Boss

attributes.content: I am confident that you will be able to move them, and I assure you that you will be well-compensated for your efforts.
attributes.name: Yakuza Boss

attributes.content: Heh... you've gotta be joking. I'm just a pachinko parlor girl.
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: ...You don't want to help me because you think my goods are fake.
attributes.name: Yakuza Boss

attributes.content: What are you talking about? I never said that.
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: (Gestures)
attributes.name: Yakuza Boss

attributes.content: Yes, boss, I got it all on tape.
attributes.name: Cool-Headed Yakuza

attributes.content: ...You set me up?!
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Only basic due diligence.
attributes.name: Yakuza Boss

attributes.content: I have faith in your abilities, Kichisei-san.
attributes.name: Yakuza Boss

attributes.content: I spent my entire fortune to get these goods from the legislator. If you think they're all fake, I'll settle the score with him, with your report in hand...
attributes.name: Yakuza Boss

attributes.content: If they're good... then you'll help me get it sold, all of it, for the billions it's worth.
attributes.name: Yakuza Boss

attributes.content: Do you know where Kichisei is?
attributes.name: Confused Resident

attributes.content: The pachinko shop's closed, and there's no sign on the door...
attributes.name: Confused Resident

attributes.content: Something must have come up, I guess? She's a busy girl.
attributes.name: Perplexed Resident

attributes.content: No cheap pachinko today, I guess. Can't go to other places once you get used to her prices...
attributes.name: Confused Resident

attributes.content: Kichisei! Welcome back!
attributes.name: Confused Resident

attributes.content: Ugh...
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Why the long face?
attributes.name: Perplexed Resident

attributes.content: Hmm... it's all my bloody fault. I should have never gotten involved in this!
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Never should have had anything to do with those people... now I either have to sell billions in fake goods, or owe them billions!
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: B-Billions?!
attributes.name: Confused Resident & Perplexed Resident

attributes.content: I couldn't pay it even if I sold the shop... heck, not even if I sold myself!
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Kichisei staggers towards her shop, tapping her own head, leaving behind the dumbfounded passersby.
As night falls, the neon sign of the Lucky Star blinks irregularly, seemingly ready to go out at any minute.
Kichisei, Kichisei... what's with you and your unlucky stars?
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: She's home, boss.
attributes.name: Cool-Headed Yakuza

attributes.content: What did she do?
attributes.name: Yakuza Boss

attributes.content: Nothing... she cried for a while with a pillow in her arms, rolled around on the ground a while, and she's now playing video games.
attributes.name: Cool-Headed Yakuza

attributes.content: ...She didn't call anyone?
attributes.name: Yakuza Boss

attributes.content: No.
attributes.name: Cool-Headed Yakuza

attributes.content: Boss, are you sure she's the one we're looking for? She doesn't have anything at home except game machines, and she doesn't look rich at all...
attributes.name: Cool-Headed Yakuza

attributes.content: That's impossible!
attributes.name: Yakuza Boss

attributes.content: Her grandmother made so much selling fake jewelry. How could she not leave any for her granddaughter?
attributes.name: Yakuza Boss

attributes.content: She was like this when we scouted her out, wasting away most of her days. That means she's not short of money.
attributes.name: Yakuza Boss

attributes.content: I'm not about to let a big fin like this slip away!
attributes.name: Yakuza Boss

attributes.content: Hello? Yes... what?
attributes.name: Cool-Headed Yakuza

attributes.content: ...Got it.
attributes.name: Cool-Headed Yakuza

attributes.content: Boss, the informant says she's packing her stuff!
attributes.name: Cool-Headed Yakuza

attributes.content: Hmph, I knew it... keep a close eye on her. Don't let her get away.
attributes.name: Yakuza Boss

attributes.content: Everyday items, accessories, snacks, all half-price—
attributes.name: Friendly Stall Owner

attributes.content: Hey, Kichisei! What's with that huge rucksack on your back?
attributes.name: Friendly Stall Owner

attributes.content: I came to say good-bye, Suzuki ji-san... I think I may have to leave Kajimachi for a while.
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: What's the matter all of a sudden?
attributes.name: Suzuki

attributes.content: I-It's nothing. It's just... well, I guess I'm taking my business elsewhere.
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: What business could you be in such a hurry about...? Don't tell me you ran into trouble?
attributes.name: Suzuki

attributes.content: You can just say it. We've known each other for so long, I'll help however I can.
attributes.name: Suzuki

attributes.content: (Glances about) Well... I guess there's a fair bit of trouble, alright. But it's my problem and I don't want to drag anyone else into it.
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Anyway, this is what happened...
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: I'm so sad about this, Kichisei-chan...
attributes.name: Sad Stall Owner

attributes.content: Your grandma was good to me, and we've been like sisters to each other all these years. And now you're just packing up and leaving?
attributes.name: Sad Stall Owner

attributes.content: What's gonna happen to your shop...?
attributes.name: Sad Stall Owner

attributes.content: Old Man Tessai owns the shop, he'll find someone to take care of it.
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: It's a good location. There'll be a tenant interested in the second-floor shop. Maybe a video shop, or a ramen shop...
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: (Sob) That's enough, Kichisei-chan... I don't want anyone else to open shop here. I just want you to stay here in Kajimachi...
attributes.name: Sad Stall Owner

attributes.content: B-But... I've gotta go, nee-chan.
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: So sudden? At least let us hold a party for you to see you off. I'll let the others know.
attributes.name: Angry Stall Owner

attributes.content: (Glances around) N-No, there's no need! I'm leaving tomorrow and I don't want to bother people.
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Kichisei has been out all day, saying goodbye to her neighbors.
attributes.name: Cool-Headed Yakuza

attributes.content: She noticed me from the beginning and didn't say anything about the appraisal or debt.
attributes.name: Cool-Headed Yakuza

attributes.content: Hmph. Knew it. She's got zero cards to play.
attributes.name: Yakuza Boss

attributes.content: Maybe... she's setting herself up to borrow money.
attributes.name: Cool-Headed Yakuza

attributes.content: From a bunch of hawkers on a run-down street?
attributes.name: Yakuza Boss

attributes.content: Let's see how long she can hide...
attributes.name: Yakuza Boss

attributes.content: ...Enough cards for today. Not in the mood.
You all know about Kichisei?
She was practically in tears when she came around to say goodbye in the morning. Made my heart hurt...
Any idea who's behind it?
There were a few unfamiliar faces who had been tailing her. Didn't look like honest folk.
I told Takahashi and Watanabe to follow them when I closed the stall, and try to find out more.
Good. I'll get some old friends.
Ah, you're gonna do it?
Did you forget the oath we swore to Tessai? We washed our hands of all this stuff in exchange for a peaceful existence on this street for the rest of our lives—
Tessai's got his hands full with his number two right now. He might not be able to help the girl even if he wanted to.
Besides, she's OUR little girl. How do we look into each other's eyes at this card table again if we don't do anything for her?
...You're right. All these years of peace and quiet have made me senile...
Enough talk. Let's get to work.
So—how did you end up still staying here at the shop?
It was weird. I had all my stuff packed and was ready to say goodbye to Old Man Tessai, when I found those yakuza standing at my door just as I was about to leave...
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: (Deep bow) We're very sorry!
attributes.name: Yakuza Boss & Fearful Yakuza

attributes.content: Huh?
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: (Staying bowed) We really apologize for our rudeness! We didn't know you had ties to Isazaki's Shochiku-kai!
attributes.name: Yakuza Boss

attributes.content: Huh? What's that?
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: We understand our mistake now! Please, have mercy on us!
attributes.name: Yakuza Boss

attributes.content: Please accept this token of our apology, Kichisei-sama!
attributes.name: Yakuza Boss

attributes.content: (Bows even deeper) Again, we're really, really sorry!
attributes.name: Yakuza Boss

attributes.content: Not only did I not have to pay a single mon, I made a fair bit of money in appraisal fees... amazing, isn't it?
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: It's an interesting story, alright... do you want me to look into who took care of it for you?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Nah, no point bringing everything into the open.
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: The kind soul who helped me never revealed themselves. That means they don't want people to know who they are.
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Besides, maybe it's my good luck—see this 'Great Blessing' omikuji I just got at the shrine?
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Well, that's a healthy frame of mind to be in.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Hey, life's not so bad, is it? I was thinking how great it would be if I could stay at this shop for the rest of my life.
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: *sigh* I envy you. I wish I had inherited a huge amount of money too...
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Who said I inherited a bunch of money?
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Grandma always said 'Life's short, enjoy it while it lasts.' She would take me out on trips whenever she made any money.
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Come to think of it, we could hardly even afford to eat whenever we came back from one of those trips...
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: (Wipes sweat) *sigh* Now I know where you got your habits from. Good thing you folks didn't give this shop up...
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Of course we wouldn't give this shop up. It's our only home, and we'd have no roof above our heads if we gave it up! I know that much, at least.
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Looks like we've got a customer! All the machines are on. Just put a coin in. Help yourself to drinks and snacks at the counter—
attributes.name: Kichisei
